title: Create a Wrapping Row
description: Create a flex container with 10 items that wrap to multiple lines.
instructions:
1. Create a container with display: flex
2. Add 10 items with width: 150px
3. Use flex-wrap: wrap
4. Add gap: 1rem
hints: Use flex-wrap: wrap with fixed-width items
validation: Items should wrap into multiple rows when container is narrow.

title: Responsive Card Grid with Flex Wrap
description: Create a responsive card grid that displays 3 cards per row on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile using only flex-wrap and flex-basis.
instructions:
1. Create a flex container with wrap
2. Use flex: 1 1 300px on items to control sizing
3. Cards should have min-width of 300px
4. When container is 900px+: 3 per row, 600px+: 2 per row, <600px: 1 per row
hints: No media queries needed for the grid itself
validation: Cards should change from 3 to 2 to 1 per row as viewport shrinks.

title: Masonry-Like Layout with Flex Wrap
description: Create a masonry-like layout where items have different widths but wrap naturally.
instructions:
1. Create a container with flex-wrap: wrap
2. Create items of varying widths (1x, 2x, 1.5x)
3. Use flex-grow and flex-basis to control sizing
4. Ensure items fill the row without gaps
5. Different items should be different colors
hints: Use different flex values for different item sizes
box-sizing: border-box prevents width calculation issues
validation: Items should fill rows without gaps, with varying widths.
